Functions.Name: IsValidLongPackageName
Functions.Description: Helper function for converting short to long script package name (InputCore -> ScriptInputCore)

Params.Name: bIncludeReadOnlyRoots
Params.Description: If true, will include roots that you should not save to. (Temp, Script)

Params.Name: OutReason
Params.Description: When returning false, this will provide a description of what was wrong with the name.

Return.Description: true if a valid long package name

Functions.Name: IsValidObjectPath
Functions.Description:
Returns true if the path starts with a valid root (i.e. Game, Engine, etc) and contains no illegal characters.
	  This validates that the packagename is valid, and also makes sure the object after package name is also correct.
	  This will return false if passed a path starting with Classname'

Params.Name: OutReason
Params.Description: When returning false, this will provide a description of what was wrong with the name.

Return.Description: true if a valid object path

Functions.Name: DoesPackageExist
Functions.Description: Checks if the given string is a long package name or not.

Return.Description: true if the specified package name points to an existing package, false otherwise.
